plugins.name: gen
plugins.description: Genorah v4.0.0 — Cinematic Intelligence. 108-agent A2A-protocol pipeline (10 directors + 98 workers) for award-caliber frontend design. Persistent single-canvas 3D (R3F + Theatre.js + GSAP + Lenis) at cinematic/immersive intensity tiers. 42 archetypes (17 WebGPU-native), 394-pt two-axis quality gate (254 Design Craft + 140 UX Integrity), 7 MCP integrations (Rodin, Meshy, Flux Kontext, Recraft, Kling + nano-banana + Playwright), 9 npm packages, recipe-driven photoreal asset pipeline with cost ledger and full provenance, generative archetype synthesis, Living Systems runtime, sqlite-vec cross-project memory graph, Deno-sandboxed agent marketplace, offline-first mode. From discovery to ship in measurably enforced quality.

plugins.name: wavy-bavy
plugins.description: Integrate the wavy-bavy library for seamless wave transitions between page sections
